title: cyclosorus angustipinnus
intro: Cyclosorus angustipinnus, also known as the Chinese cyclosorus fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It is a type of medicinal plant that has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its various health benefits. The leaves and stems of the Cyclosorus angustipinnus plant are used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. Cyclosorus angustipinnus is typically prepared as a tea or decoction for its herbal uses, and it is also used in some traditional Chinese medicine formulas to promote overall health and well-being.
